## IMQ\_LOG\_ARGS variable

Environment variable IMQ\_LOG\_ARGS=\[1, 0\] - enables/disables profiled call arguments to be logged

 {<!-- -->boolean<!-- -->}

**Signature:**

```typescript
IMQ_LOG_ARGS: boolean
```
